text.title: Meta Ads Creative Strategy Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: set-funnel-context
step.action: Confirm funnel stage; map to hook style (TOFU=pattern interrupt; MOFU=problem statement; BOFU=urgency/social proof).

step.name: draft-hook
step.action: Draft 3 hook variants ≤3 sec each; require pattern-interrupt or problem statement.

step.name: map-formats
step.action: Distribute variants across 1:1 / 4:5 / 9:16 per placement plan.

step.name: set-refresh-cadence
step.action: Pick 7-14 day refresh window; bottom-performer swap rule.
step.decision-gate: If only 1-2 variants available, BLOCK — return to production to ship minimum 3.
